description: Use this API to modify the data of an existing FACTS device in the working case, or to add a new FACTS device to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, FACTS Device Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 34.4.0. ierr, realaro = facts_data_3(name, intgar, realari, mname)
python_syntax: ierr, realaro = facts_data_3(name, intgar, realari, mname)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the facts device. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of thirteen elements specifying corresponding to values REALAR(1) through REALAR(13) as described above. (input).

parameters.name: mname
parameters.description: Name of the facts device that is the master device for this ipfc slave device. (input; blank by default).

return_values.name: realaro
return_values.description: An array of six elements specifying corresponding to values REALAR(14) through REALAR(19) as described above. (output).

intgar.description: I, sending end bus number (no default allowed).
J, terminal end bus number (0 for STATCON) (0 by default).
VSREF, series voltage reference code for modes 4 and 7 (0 for sending end voltage; 1 for series current) (0 by default).
IREG, regulated bus number (0 by default).
NODE, regulated node number (0 by default).

realari.description: PDES, desired real power at terminal bus (0.0 by default).
QDES, desired reactive power at terminal bus (0.0 by default).
VSET, sending bus voltage setpoint (1.0 by default).
SHMX, sending end maximum shunt current (MVA at rated voltage) (99.99 * SBASE by default).
TRMX, maximum bridge real power transfer (99.99 * SBASE by default).
VTMN, minimum terminal bus voltage magnitude (0.9 by default).
VTMX, maximum terminal bus voltage magnitude (1.1 by default).
VSMX, maximum series voltage magnitude (1.0 by default).
IMX, maximum series current (MVA at rated voltage) (0.0 by default).
LINX, pu reactance of temporary series element (0.05 by default).
RMPCT, percent of contributed reactive power (100.0 by default).
SET1, real component of constant Z (MODE = 3), magnitude of constant V (MODE = 4), or VD (MODE = 7 or 8) (0.0 by default).
SET2, imaginary component of constant Z (MODE = 3), angle of constant V (MODE = 4), or VQ (MODE = 7 or 8) (0.005 by default when MODE = 3; 0.0 otherwise).

realaro.description: real component of present effective series Z (returned).
imaginary component of present effective series Z (returned).
magnitude of present series voltage, FDVREF reference (returned).
le of present series voltage, FDVREF reference (returned).
real component of present series voltage, FDVREF reference (returned).
imaginary component of present series voltage, FDVREF reference (returned).

error_codes.description: no sending end bus is specified.
the same bus is specified for the sending and terminal end buses.
blank FACTS device name is invalid.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

warnings - one or more of: - Invalid FACTS device control mode. - Invalid owner number. - Invalid series voltage reference code. - Regulated bus not found. - Remote regulated bus is specified for a type 3 bus. - Type code of regulated bus is not 1 or 2. - Shunt element voltage setpoint must be positive. - Terminal bus voltage limit must be positive. - VTMX is less than VTMN. - Series voltage limit must be positive. - Shunt current limit must not be negative. - Bridge real power transfer limit must not be negative. - Series current limit must not be negative. - Series reactance must be positive. - Shunt current limit is not 0.0 for an IPFC device. - Bridge real power transfer limit is not 0.0 for an IPFC slave. - Impedance setpoint has reactance of 0.0. - RMPCT is not positive. - Master IPFC FACTS device not found. - Bus is dummy bus of a multi-section line. - Multi-section line grouping deleted. - Owner table is full - Invalid node number - Non-zero regulated node specified but regulated bus does not belong to a substation - Regulated node not found - Regulated node is not connected to any bus section of the regulated bus.
